title: scutellaria sulphurea
intro: Scutellaria sulphurea, also known as Yellow Skullcap, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and native to China. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria sulphurea include reducing anxiety and stress, alleviating symptoms of insomnia and restlessness, and supporting immune function. Scutellaria sulphurea can be prepared in herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
